descriptions.exec_ops: Premium operational panel with Glassmorphism design focused on senior management. Centralizes critical workflows: coded weekly agendas, travel itinerary control, document approval queues (Health/Education), real-time team directories, and automated recruitment workflows.
descriptions.pm_dashboard: Interactive dashboard focused on product management and growth analytics. Implements Kanban boards for Sprints, design trackers, technical milestone timelines, mobile previews, and advanced visual analytics modules for conversion funnels and retention (DAU).
descriptions.support_hub: Modular omnichannel support platform with a filterable ticket queue (channel, priority, status), live chat panel with animated typing indicator, appointment calendar in Health and Education modes, order lookup with refund and escalation actions, system migration tracker, and real-time KPI dashboard.
descriptions.sales_design: Design and development of a unified control panel focused on commercial operations: branding, marketing campaigns, automated email templates, social scheduling, and real-time data analytics.
descriptions.enterprise_pipeline: Background data ingestion and processing system designed to eliminate state drift and maintain system stability. Architecture centered on boring SQL efficiency: explicit relational modeling, composite and partial B-Tree indexes, deterministic state machine (NestJS), and reactive synchronization via dual-channel WAL replication through Supabase WebSockets — no polling, no duplicated local state.
descriptions.scientific_sandbox: An interactive educational application designed to visually demonstrate sequential and real-time data flow across the three core stack layers. Functions as a simplified experimental environment that eliminates enterprise infrastructure overhead to isolate and validate the exact mechanics of the information lifecycle. Core features: High-Concurrency Simulation, Unified Data Contract (shared types between client and server), and a Real-Time Pipeline with direct DB persistence and reactive streaming via distributed sockets.
